top_signals.title: How a Houthi blockade in the Red Sea tightens Iran’s grip on global energy supply
top_signals.summary: Yemen sits on the southern gateway to the Red Sea, and closing that would open up a new front in the energy crisis and Iran's overarching conflict with the U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
